title: FToFreecam
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a099f12c97ca1eeaa1e63abe7870130f8311de0_0.webp)

# F To Freecam... ...Is A Simple Freecam Mod! ...Just Press F And You Are In Freecam ...Control The Flight Speed While Flying By Simply Spinning The Mousewheel!
How To Use 1. Download The Mod And [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) 2. Put Both In Your ```Mods``` Folder 3. Start Minecaft And Press F To Start Freecaming!
Server Setup F To Freecam Does Not Allow Freecam On Multplayer Servers! But If You Still Want To Freecam, Do This: 1. Create An Server With The Serversoftware Fabric. 2. Install Fabric API With The Same F To Freecam Mod Used On The Client. 3. Start Your Server!
